metadata.title: UniPost | Social Media Posting API for Developers
metadata.description: UniPost gives developers one API to connect customer social accounts, upload media, schedule posts, and publish across major social platforms.

hero.title: Post to every social platform with one API
hero.body: Connect customer accounts, upload media, and publish to X, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, YouTube, and more through one unified API.
hero.note: Built for developers adding social publishing to apps, workflows, and agents.

model.yourAppBody: Scheduling tools, SaaS products, internal workflows, and agents.
model.apiBody: Connect accounts, upload media, publish posts, and track delivery.

why.title: Stop maintaining separate social media integrations
why.body: Every platform has its own connection model, content constraints, media behavior, publish lifecycle, and failure modes. UniPost turns those differences into one API.
why.summary: One product feature instead of nine integration projects
why.beforeBody: Custom OAuth, media validation, retry logic, result tracking, and platform-specific code for each network.
why.afterBody: Connect accounts once, publish by account ID, and monitor delivery with one API and webhook surface.

workflow.title: Get an API key, connect accounts, publish content
workflow.body: The production path is three steps: authenticate your app, connect customer accounts, then send publish requests through one API.
workflow.keyBody: Create a UniPost API key from your workspace and use it to authenticate every publish, media, and account request.
workflow.connectBody: Send customers through hosted OAuth flows, then store the returned connected account IDs in your product.
workflow.publishBody: Submit text, media, or per-platform variants in one request and let UniPost handle validation and delivery.

capabilities.title: One API surface for the social layer
capabilities.body: Pick the endpoint for the job: onboard accounts, publish posts, report analytics, receive delivery events, and handle inbox workflows.
capabilities.connectBody: Create a hosted OAuth session for customer account onboarding.
capabilities.postsBody: Publish, schedule, or draft content across connected destinations.
capabilities.analyticsBody: Fetch workspace-wide reporting totals and trend breakdowns.
capabilities.webhooksBody: Receive publish outcomes and account lifecycle events without polling.
capabilities.keysBody: Create workspace keys for server-side UniPost API access.
capabilities.inboxBody: Read comments, DMs, and reply workflows across supported social channels.

quickstart.title: A publish call should feel boring
quickstart.body: Once accounts are connected, your app sends one request. UniPost handles the platform-specific rules behind it.

cta.title: Build the social layer once
cta.body: Add account connection, media upload, multi-platform publishing, and delivery monitoring without maintaining every social integration yourself.
